title: either A or B, neither A nor B

stages.concept:
# Unit 088: either A or B, neither A nor B - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 상관접속사 **either A or B**와 **neither A nor B**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **either A or B** — A 또는 B 둘 중 하나

> You can have **either** tea **or** coffee.
> 너는 차 또는 커피 둘 중 하나를 마실 수 있다.

> **Either** you **or** I am right.
> 너 또는 내가 맞다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **neither A nor B** — A도 B도 아닌 (둘 다 부정)

> **Neither** Tom **nor** Jane was at the party.
> Tom도 Jane도 파티에 없었다.

> I like **neither** math **nor** science.
> 나는 수학도 과학도 좋아하지 않는다.

**Q. "Either you or he (       ) wrong." 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 be동사를 고르세요.**
1. am
2. are
3. is ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! 주어로 쓰일 때 동사는 B인 'he'에 가깝기 때문에 'is'를 쓴답니다. 동사는 **B에 일치**시켜요.

> **Either** you **or** he **is** wrong. (he에 일치)
> **Neither** she **nor** they **are** coming. (they에 일치)

🧑‍🎓 학생: either A or B(둘 중 하나), neither A nor B(둘 다 아닌)! 동사는 B에 일치시키면 되는 거군요.

| 상관접속사 | 뜻 | 동사 수 일치 |
|------|------|------|
| both A and B | 둘 다 | 항상 복수 |
| either A or B | 둘 중 하나 | B에 일치 |
| neither A nor B | 둘 다 아닌 | B에 일치 |
| not only A but also B | A뿐 아니라 B도 | B에 일치 |
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 088: either A or B, neither A nor B - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Either you (     ) I should clean this up.
> **정답** or

---

**02.** Neither he ? she was at home.
> **정답** nor

---

**03.** You can have ? tea or coffee.
> **정답** either

---

**04.** ? Tom nor Amy came to the party.
> **정답** Neither

---

**05.** Either my mom ? my dad will pick me up.
> **정답** or

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Either you and I should do it.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** and → or

---

**07.** Neither she or he likes spicy food.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** or → nor

---

**08.** Either pizza and pasta is fine.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** and → or

---

**09.** Neither the dog or the cat is mine.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** or → nor

---

**10.** Either you and she can go.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** and → or

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
너 아니면 내가 해야 한다.
you I should do it.
> **정답** Either, or

---

**12.** 그도 그녀도 오지 않았다.
he she came.
> **정답** Neither, nor

---

**13.** 사과든 바나나든 골라.
Choose apples bananas.
> **정답** either, or

---

**14.** 커피도 차도 마시지 않는다.
I drink coffee tea.
> **정답** neither, nor

---

**15.** 엄마 아니면 아빠가 데리러 올 거야.
my mom my dad will pick me up.
> **정답** Either, or

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
빨간색이든 파란색이든 골라라.
Choose either red or blue
> **정답** Choose / either / red / or / blue

---

**17.** 그도 나도 수영을 못 한다.
Neither he nor can I swim
> **정답** Neither / he / nor / I / can / swim

---

**18.** 너 아니면 그녀가 발표해야 한다.
Either or you she should present
> **정답** Either / you / or / she / should / present

---

**19.** 고양이도 개도 집에 없다.
Neither the cat nor the dog is at home
> **정답** Neither / the / cat / nor / the / dog / is / at / home

---

**20.** 피자든 햄버거든 시키자.
Let's order either or pizza a hamburger
> **정답** Let's / order / either / pizza / or / a / hamburger
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 088: either A or B, neither A nor B - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I will study ________ math or English.
not only
neither
either
both
> **정답** either

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy likes _______ coffee nor coke.
neither
and
both
either
> **정답** neither

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Either he or she will teach English.
Both he and she don't like books.
Neither she nor they is taking online classes
today.
Neither Amy nor Tom is sad.
> **정답** Neither she nor they is taking online classes today.

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Amy brought both cash and a card.
Amy uses not a plastic cup but a reusable cup.
Amy will drink either coffee nor milk.
I eat neither peanuts or walnuts.
> **정답** I eat neither peanuts or walnuts., Amy will drink
either coffee nor milk.

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy will have either a sandwich _______ spaghetti
for lunch.
and
but
or
also
> **정답** or

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He uses neither YouTube _______ Netflix.
nor
but
or
also
> **정답** nor

---

**07.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바꿀때 알맞은 것을 모두
고르시오. [2개]
He doesn't like action movies.
He doesn't like romantic movies.
He doesn't like either action movies or
romantic movies.
He doesn't like neither action movies nor
romantic movies.
He doesn't like either action movies nor
romantic movies.
He likes neither action movies nor romantic
movies.
> **정답** He doesn't like either action movies or romantic
movies., He likes neither action movies nor romantic
movies.

---

**08.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바꿀때 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
She can use a mobile phone, or she can use a tablet.
She can use neither a mobile phone nor
tablet.
She can use either a mobile phone nor tablet.
She can use either a mobile phone or tablet.
She can use both a mobile phone and tablet.
> **정답** She can use either a mobile phone or tablet.

---

**09.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
너는 비행기나 배 둘중 하나를 타고 제주도에 갈 수 있다.
You can go to Jeju Island both by plane and by
ship.
You can go to Jeju Island either by plane nor
by ship.
You can go to Jeju Island either by plane or by
ship.
You can go to Jeju Island neither by plane nor
by ship.
> **정답** You can go to Jeju Island either by plane or by ship.

---

**10.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이 파티에서는 청바지도 후드티도 입으면 안된다.
You should wear either jeans or hoodies at
this party.
You shouldn't wear neither jeans or hoodies at
this party.
You should wear neither jeans nor hoodies at
this party.
You should wear both jeans and hoodies at
this party.
> **정답** You should wear neither jeans nor hoodies at this
party.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I've never had either a dog or a bird.
We will take neither the subway or the bus.
Either he nor I passed the test.
Neither Amy nor Tom has a younger brother.
> **정답** Neither Amy nor Tom has a younger brother., I've
never had either a dog or a bird.

---

**12.** 다음 두 문장의 의마가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 알맞게
짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He didn't watch either movies or dramas this year.
He watches _______ movies _______ dramas this
year.
either - or
neither - nor
neither - or
either - nor
> **정답** neither - nor

---

**13.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이
알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She will buy clothes online or she will go to the mall.
She will _______ buy clothes online _______ go to the
mall.
neither - or
neither - nor
either - nor
either - or
> **정답** either - or

---

**14.** 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태를 알맞게 바꾼 것을
고르시오.
Amy mostly either cooks at home or (go) to a
restaurant.
went
goes
go
will go
> **정답** goes

---

**15.** 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태를 알맞게 바꾼 것을
고르시오.
Neither she nor you (look) for a dictionary.
looking
don't look
look
looks
> **정답** look

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오.
너는 크레파스나 색연필 둘 중 하나를 사용하면 된다.
You can use _______ crayons or colored pencils.
either
as
neither
both
> **정답** either

---

**17.** 주어진 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오.
Amy나 Tom 둘 중 누구도 회의에 참석하지 않았다.
_______ Amy nor Tom attended the meeting.
Not
Both
Either
Neither
> **정답** Neither

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Neither he nor I lives in
Seoul.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** lives → live

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She will tell either he or me
the fact.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** he → him

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I enjoy either listening to
music or to draw on Sundays.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to draw → drawing
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 088 either A or B, neither A nor B중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 것을 선택하여 빈칸에 써 넣으시오.
[either, neither, both]
He wants to be  (     )  a singer or a movie star.
정답 either

---

**02.** 다음 중 알맞은 것을 선택하여 빈칸에 써 넣으시오.
[either, neither, both]
 my sister nor I like milk .
정답 Neither

---

**03.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
나는 개나 고양이 둘 중 한 마리를 키우고 싶다.
I want to have neither a dog nor a cat.
→I want to have
.
정답 either a dog or a cat

---

**04.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
그들은 울수도 웃을수도 없었다.
They could either cry or laugh.
→ They could  (     ) .
정답 neither cry nor laugh

---

**05.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
그나 그녀 둘 중 한 명이 거짓말을 한다.
Either he nor she tell a lie.
→ Either  (     ) .
정답 he or she tells a lie

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀는 학교에 갔거나 집에 있거나 둘중 하나다.
힌트 (     ) go to school
She  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  or was at home.
정답 either, went, to, school

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
날씨는 비가 오지도 눈이 오지도 않았다.
힌트 (     ) rainy, snowy
The weather was  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 neither, rainy, nor, snowy

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나도 내 남동생도 영어를 좋아하지 않는다.
힌트 (     ) I, my brother, like
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
English.
정답 Neither, I, nor, my, brother, likes

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
너는 교실에서 시끄럽게 하거나 뛰어다니면 안 됩니다.
힌트 (     ) make, noise, neither, run, around, nor
You must  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
 in the classroom.
정답 neither, make, noise, nor, run, around

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그들은 체스나 카드 게임 중 하나를 하기를 원했다.
힌트 (     ) chess, or, card games, either
They wanted to play  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 either, chess, or, card, games

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 088: either A or B, neither A nor B - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I will study ________ science or history. not only neither either both
> 정답: either

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom likes _______ tea nor juice. neither and both either
> 정답: neither

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Either he or she will teach math.
Both he and she don't like sports.
Neither she nor they is taking art classes today.
Neither Tom nor Amy is upset.
> 정답: Neither she nor they is taking art classes today.

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Tom brought both a pen and a notebook.
Amy uses not a paper bag but a fabric bag.
Tom will drink either water nor tea.
I eat neither apples or bananas.
> 정답: I eat neither apples or bananas., Tom will drink

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy will have either a sandwich _______ a salad for lunch. and but or also
> 정답: or

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He reads neither comics _______ novels. nor but or also
> 정답: nor

---

**07.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바꿀때 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
He doesn't like horror movies.
He doesn't like comedy movies.
He doesn't like either horror movies or comedy movies.
He doesn't like neither horror movies nor comedy movies.
He doesn't like either horror movies nor comedy movies.
He likes neither horror movies nor comedy movies.
> 정답: He doesn't like either horror movies or comedy

---

**08.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바꿀때 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
She can use a laptop, or she can use a tablet.
She can use neither a laptop nor tablet.
She can use either a laptop nor tablet.
She can use either a laptop or tablet.
She can use both a laptop and tablet.
> 정답: She can use either a laptop or tablet.

---

**09.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
너는 버스나 지하철 둘중 하나를 타고 학교에 갈 수 있다.
You can go to school both by bus and by subway.
You can go to school either by bus nor by subway.
You can go to school either by bus or by subway.
You can go to school neither by bus nor by subway.
> 정답: You can go to school either by bus or by subway.

---

**10.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이 행사에서는 반바지도 슬리퍼도 입으면 안된다.
You should wear either shorts or slippers at this event.
You shouldn't wear neither shorts or slippers at this event.
You should wear neither shorts nor slippers at this event.
You should wear both shorts and slippers at this event.
> 정답: You should wear neither shorts nor slippers at this

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I've never had either a cat or a bird.
We will take neither the taxi or the bus.
Either he nor I passed the quiz.
Neither Tom nor Amy has a younger sister.
> 정답: Neither Tom nor Amy has a younger sister., I've

---

**12.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He didn't watch either cartoons or dramas this year.
He watches _______ cartoons _______ dramas this year. either - or neither - nor neither - or either - nor
> 정답: neither - nor

---

**13.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She will buy shoes online or she will go to the store.
She will _______ buy shoes online _______ go to the store. neither - or neither - nor either - nor either - or
> 정답: either - or

---

**14.** 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태를 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Amy mostly either cooks at home or (go) to a cafeteria. went goes go will go
> 정답: goes

---

**15.** 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태를 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Neither she nor you (look) for a calculator. looking don't look look looks
> 정답: look

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
너는 펜이나 연필 둘 중 하나를 사용하면 된다.
You can use _______ pens or pencils. either as neither both
> 정답: either

---

**17.** 주어진 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Tom이나 Amy 둘 중 누구도 발표에 참여하지 않았다. _______ Tom nor Amy joined the presentation.
Not Both Either Neither
> 정답: Neither

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Neither  he  nor  I  lives  in Busan. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
